docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,430.00 FILED BY SALARIA GROUP LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VOYAJOY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
